sections.title: Come to the Feast/Ven al Banquete
sections.author: Bob Hurd
sections.snippet: Come, come to the banquet. Come, come to the feast. Here the hungry find plenty, here the thirsty shall drink, here at the supper of Jesus, come to the feast.

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: Your Words, Lord, are Spirit and Life

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: The Lord sent me to bring glad tidings to the poor, and to proclaim liberty of captives

sections.title: Your Words Are Spirit and Life
sections.author: Bernadette Farrell
sections.snippet: Your words are spirit and life, O Lord: richer than gold, stronger than death. Your words are spirit and life, O Lord; life everlasting.

sections.title: Ang Katawan ni Kristo/Behold, the Body of Christ
sections.author: Ricky Manalo CSP / Pia de Leon
sections.snippet: In the presence of our God, as we gather here in Christ, feel the Spirit breathe upon us, the breath of life, graced and divine. We have come to break the bread; we have come to share our lives. Let us bring these fruits to the table, the love of God, yours and mine!

sections.title: Taste and See
sections.author: Steve Angrisano
sections.snippet: Taste and see the goodness of the Lord, the goodness of the Lord. Taste and see the goodness of the Lord, the goodness of the Lord.

sections.title: 10,000 Reasons (Bless the Lord)
sections.author: Jonas Myrin / Matt Redman
sections.snippet: Bless the Lord, O my soul, O my soul; worship his holy name. Sing like never before, O my soul; I’ll worship your holy name.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
